display_text: Jidi Pollen Bag, Tier 3: Neutral item. Spreads a damaging cloud in a large 700 radius, applying Pollinate to all nearby enemies. Pollinate reduces health restoration by 30% and deals damage equal to 9% of max health over 9 seconds (1% per second). Damage is classified as non-lethal HP Loss. Stats: CD: 25s, Radius: 700, Duration: 9s.
search_text: neutral item, tier 3 neutral, jidi pollen bag, damage over time, health reduction, anti heal, healing reduction, max health damage, hp loss, area damage, AoE debuff, reduce healing, anti regeneration, Pollinate
